completion_summary: Implemented and validated the issued-manifest formal matrix orchestrator with CPU/GPU/API scheduling, resumability, public-safe checkpoint progress, exact Cartesian and paired-condition auditing, strict resource-ledger checks, and serial-parallel semantic equivalence; 11 focused and 109 integrated tests passed.
scope: Implement a manifest-driven formal matrix orchestrator with CPU process parallelism, GPU quota/exclusivity, API rate-limited resumable queues, public-safe progress, exact Cartesian completeness, paired-condition and accounting checks, and serial-parallel equivalence
